_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: we observed that shRNA-mediated constitutive depletion of BRD4 conferred extreme sensitivity to JQ1-induced cell death compared to JQ1-treated shControl cells
details: shRNA-mediated constitutive depletion of BRD4 conferred extreme sensitivity to JQ1-induced cell death compared to control cells
